ctr_portfolio_reader.summary: Static web container combining HTML chapters, CSS visual styling, and JavaScript page-turn state management.

cmp_cover_entry_controller.summary: Starts the narrative by opening the cover and transitioning into spread or mobile-page navigation state.

cmp_spread_navigation_engine.title: Spread Navigation Engine
cmp_spread_navigation_engine.summary: Tracks currentSpread and flips sheet layers while keeping active pages in front for interaction.

cmp_link_tap_layer.title: Link Tap Layer
cmp_link_tap_layer.techLabel: [Component: fixed overlay hotspots for visible links]
cmp_link_tap_layer.summary: Builds transparent tap targets only for visible-page reading links and captures tap metrics per destination.

cmp_quote_block_layout.title: Quote Block Layout Adapter
cmp_quote_block_layout.summary: Offsets the 'what we heard' quote cards lower so the section reads centered near the upper-middle of the page.

cmp_mobile_page_adapter.title: Mobile Page Adapter
cmp_mobile_page_adapter.summary: Switches to single-page rendering for narrow viewports and preserves usable navigation behavior.

cmp_theme_preference_manager.title: Theme Preference Manager
cmp_theme_preference_manager.summary: Restores saved mode and toggles dark-mode class so reading remains comfortable in different lighting conditions.

ext_browser_runtime.summary: Delivers click and resize events and stores theme keys in localStorage.
